ideation: This animation sequence will mimic the act of gently picking a mango from a tree.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the care taken when handling a ripe fruit.  The left arm will reach out, while the right arm provides balance. The sequence will emphasize smoothness and natural movement. Frame 1: Both arms start in a relaxed position at the sides. Frame 2: The left arm extends outward and slightly upward, as if reaching for the mango. The right arm remains mostly still, providing a counterbalance. Frame 3: The left arm bends slightly at the "shoulder", as if grasping the mango. The hand is oriented as if gently cupping the fruit. Frame 4: The left arm begins to retract, bringing the mango closer to the robot. Frame 5: Both arms return to their relaxed position at the sides, with the left arm now holding the imaginary mango close to the body.

frames.beat: arms hang at rest, ready to pick
left arm reaches out gently for the fruit
left hand cups the mango, a delicate grasp
carefully bringing the mango closer, arm retracting
arms return to rest, mango held close
